explanation: I've created a dashboard showing your current Freshsales pipeline metrics. The first KPI shows your total pipeline value (weighted by deal probability), and the second shows the count of open deals currently in your sales funnel.

widgets.title: Freshsales Pipeline Overview
widgets.subtitle: Current deal value and opportunity count

widgets.title: Key Insight
widgets.subtitle: Monitor pipeline velocity by tracking both value and deal count trends to identify potential bottlenecks in your sales process.

quickActions.label: Add Deal Stage Breakdown
quickActions.prompt: Add a chart showing deals by pipeline stage

quickActions.label: Show Top Deals
quickActions.prompt: Add a table showing the highest value open deals

quickActions.label: Add Pipeline Funnel
quickActions.prompt: Create a funnel chart showing deal progression through stages

issues.message: The data source 'freshsales_open_deal_count' returns a single value object with metadata (value, label, previous_value, comparison_label). Consider whether the user might want to see count breakdowns by stage instead, though the current implementation matches the request for 'open deals' count.
